hooks.command: bash -lc 'source "$HOME/.local/bin/env" 2>/dev/null; UV_BIN="${UV_BIN:-$(command -v uv)}"; if test -z "$UV_BIN"; then echo "uv not found; install uv in WSL before enabling Codex hooks" >&2; exit 1; fi; UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$HOME/.cache/llm-wiki/.venv" UV_LINK_MODE=copy "$UV_BIN" run --directory "/path/to/llm-wiki" python hooks/codex/session-start.py'

bash -lc 'source "$HOME/.local/bin/env" 2>/dev/null; UV_BIN="${UV_BIN:-$(command -v uv)}"; if test -z "$UV_BIN"; then echo "uv not found; install uv in WSL before enabling Codex hooks" >&2; exit 1; fi; UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$HOME/.cache/llm-wiki/.venv" UV_LINK_MODE=copy "$UV_BIN" run --directory "/path/to/llm-wiki" python hooks/codex/stop.py'

bash -lc 'source "$HOME/.local/bin/env" 2>/dev/null; UV_BIN="${UV_BIN:-$(command -v uv)}"; if test -z "$UV_BIN"; then echo "uv not found; install uv in WSL before enabling Codex hooks" >&2; exit 1; fi; UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$HOME/.cache/llm-wiki/.venv" UV_LINK_MODE=copy "$UV_BIN" run --directory "/path/to/llm-wiki" python hooks/codex/user-prompt-wiki.py'

bash -lc 'source "$HOME/.local/bin/env" 2>/dev/null; UV_BIN="${UV_BIN:-$(command -v uv)}"; if test -z "$UV_BIN"; then echo "uv not found; install uv in WSL before enabling Codex hooks" >&2; exit 1; fi; UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$HOME/.cache/llm-wiki/.venv" UV_LINK_MODE=copy "$UV_BIN" run --directory "/path/to/llm-wiki" python hooks/codex/post-tool-capture.py'
